selected_rows.expected_solo_failure_mechanism: Model may treat matching user, ticket, expiry, and manager attestation as enough and skip read/write scope.
selected_rows.visible_answer_key_basis: ESCALATE sibling approval is read-scoped, while the request is write-scoped.
selected_rows.why_fair: Requested role and approved role are both visible and policy requires exact role_group match.
selected_rows.why_not_too_obvious: The role names are adjacent and all other controls are present.

selected_rows.domain: Synthetic AP vendor payment release controls
selected_rows.expected_solo_failure_mechanism: Model may merge invoice approval and vendor profile review into payment authority.
selected_rows.visible_answer_key_basis: ESCALATE sibling has invoice approval but payment rail approval is vendor_profile_review, not destination_token_release.
selected_rows.why_fair: Required payment rail scope is explicit in policy and source.
selected_rows.why_not_too_obvious: Vendor, invoice, and destination token all appear aligned.
